meeting_sources.label: JRA annual race calendar meeting rows

constraints: Contract accepts PR-091 static samples and PR-092 normalized shape expectations only.
No live fetch runtime is in scope.
No parser implementation is in scope.
No raw source body storage is in scope.
No odds, payouts, predictions, or tips are in scope.

normalization_rules: Annual fixture data is not final timing truth. Rolling fixture, racecard, entries, declarations, or daily race information data can override annual fixture timing for the same country_id, group_id, racecourse, and meeting_date after normalization.
Interpret source times as source-country local time first. Preserve the local HH:mm value and source timezone context during normalization; derive UTC only after the normalized local record exists.
Normalize race numbers to source-listed card order. Preserve explicit source race numbers when present, otherwise derive a 1-based sequence from the race rows on the same racecourse and meeting_date.

Normalize first_race_time from the earliest normalized races[].race_time. Annual fixture times are coarse hints only; rolling/racecard/entries/declarations/daily-race-info timing can replace annual timing when both identify the same meeting.
Normalize racecourse names to the canonical country inventory spelling where possible while retaining enough source_trace context for later alias review.
Normalize meeting_date as the source-country local calendar date. Do not shift the date by UTC conversion during this contract stage.
Normalize only timetable identity and timing fields required by PR-092 snapshots.
Do not include odds, payouts, predictions, tips, raw source body storage, or generated live timetable rows.
parser_contracts.annual_vs_rolling_rule: Annual fixture data is not final timing truth. Rolling fixture, racecard, entries, declarations, or daily race information data can override annual fixture timing for the same country_id, group_id, racecourse, and meeting_date after normalization.
parser_contracts.timezone_rule: Interpret source times as source-country local time first. Preserve the local HH:mm value and source timezone context during normalization; derive UTC only after the normalized local record exists.
parser_contracts.race_number_rule: Normalize race numbers to source-listed card order. Preserve explicit source race numbers when present, otherwise derive a 1-based sequence from the race rows on the same racecourse and meeting_date.
parser_contracts.race_time_rule: Normalize first_race_time from the earliest normalized races[].race_time. Annual fixture times are coarse hints only; rolling/racecard/entries/declarations/daily-race-info timing can replace annual timing when both identify the same meeting.
parser_contracts.racecourse_name_rule: Normalize racecourse names to the canonical country inventory spelling where possible while retaining enough source_trace context for later alias review.
parser_contracts.meeting_date_rule: Normalize meeting_date as the source-country local calendar date. Do not shift the date by UTC conversion during this contract stage.
failure_modes: Missing required normalized output field.
Treating annual fixture data as final timing truth.
Failing to let rolling/racecard/entries/declarations/daily-race-info timing override annual timing for the same meeting.
Converting to UTC before preserving source-country local time and meeting_date.
Adding live fetch runtime, parser implementation, raw source body storage, generated timetable records, odds, payouts, predictions, or tips.
parser_contracts.next_sample_extraction_step: Capture one JRA calendar racecourse-date row with first-race and per-race times.

parser_contracts.racecourse_name_rule: Normalize racecourse names to the canonical country inventory spelling where possible while retaining enough source_trace context for later alias review.
parser_contracts.meeting_date_rule: Normalize meeting_date as the source-country local calendar date. Do not shift the date by UTC conversion during this contract stage.
failure_modes: Missing required normalized output field.
Treating annual fixture data as final timing truth.
Failing to let rolling/racecard/entries/declarations/daily-race-info timing override annual timing for the same meeting.
Converting to UTC before preserving source-country local time and meeting_date.
Adding live fetch runtime, parser implementation, raw source body storage, generated timetable records, odds, payouts, predictions, or tips.

parser_contracts.race_time_rule: Normalize first_race_time from the earliest normalized races[].race_time. Annual fixture times are coarse hints only; rolling/racecard/entries/declarations/daily-race-info timing can replace annual timing when both identify the same meeting.
parser_contracts.racecourse_name_rule: Normalize racecourse names to the canonical country inventory spelling where possible while retaining enough source_trace context for later alias review.
parser_contracts.meeting_date_rule: Normalize meeting_date as the source-country local calendar date. Do not shift the date by UTC conversion during this contract stage.
failure_modes: Missing required normalized output field.
Treating annual fixture data as final timing truth.
Failing to let rolling/racecard/entries/declarations/daily-race-info timing override annual timing for the same meeting.
Converting to UTC before preserving source-country local time and meeting_date.
Adding live fetch runtime, parser implementation, raw source body storage, generated timetable records, odds, payouts, predictions, or tips.
parser_contracts.next_sample_extraction_step: Capture one HRNZ harness racecard meeting.

constraints: Singapore is retained as legacy inventory only because active racing has ceased.
No active timetable contract is defined.
No first_race_time contract is defined.
No per-race contract is defined.
No live fetch runtime, parser implementation, raw source body storage, generated timetable records, odds, payouts, predictions, or tips are in scope.

normalization_rules: Retain Singapore legacy racecourse inventory references only.
Do not normalize active meeting dates, first-race times, per-race times, or generated timetable records for Singapore.
failure_modes: Any Singapore active timetable, first_race_time, races[] output, or per-race contract is invalid for this PR.
parser_contracts.next_sample_extraction_step: PR-094 should not add Singapore active timetable extraction; keep legacy inventory only.
